items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: oscar met juraj hudy today, who works for XRAY, the brand of RC cars oscar used to race when he…
items.title_zh: Oscar今天遇见了为XRAY工作的Juraj Hudy, RC汽车Oscar在小的时候曾经出赛的品牌"知道f1网格上最有才华的车手之一仍然记得我,意义很大. 有些回忆永远留在你身边 这绝对是其中之一。"
items.summary: oscar met juraj hudy today, who works for XRAY, the brand of RC cars oscar used to race when he was little 🥹🫶🏻 "knowing that one of the most talented drivers on the f1 grid still remembered me meant a lot. some memories stay with you forever. this is definitely one of them." https://t.co/3LSgWwrex8

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "can you be in the fight tomorrow for a podium?" oscar: "i hope so, potentially we can. the…
items.title_zh: 问:"你明天能参加一个讲台的战斗吗?"奥斯卡:"我希望如此,我们有可能. 前面的每个人的步调可能都相当接近。 所以我们只能等着瞧!"
items.summary: Q: "can you be in the fight tomorrow for a podium?" oscar: "i hope so, potentially we can. the pace of everyone at the front will probably be quite close. so we'll have to wait and see!" https://t.co/bSS9EDCG59
items.summary_zh: 问:"你明天能参加一个讲台的战斗吗?"奥斯卡:"我希望如此,我们有可能. 前面的每个人的步调可能都相当接近。 所以我们只能等着瞧!"

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "lando and i have been very tightly matched the whole weekend. my last lap- there's a few areas…
items.title_zh: 兰多和我整个周末都非常吻合 我的最后一圈... 有一些地方我用力地推, 也许我超越它一点点。 但我认为我们没有 速度做更多。 这就是我们的位置,我们知道它, 我们正在大力推动 尝试和改进。"
items.summary: "lando and i have been very tightly matched the whole weekend. my last lap- there's a few areas where i was pushing hard, maybe i overstepped it a little. but i dont think we had the pace to do more than that. it's where we are, we know it, we're pushing hard to try and improve." https://t.co/WSdd6KkmYg
items.summary_zh: 兰多和我整个周末都非常吻合 我的最后一圈... 有一些地方我用力地推, 也许我超越它一点点。 但我认为我们没有 速度做更多。 这就是我们的位置,我们知道它, 我们正在大力推动 尝试和改进。"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Might you hope to use your tyres better and make up some places? "We'll have to see. I mean…
items.title_zh: 问:你是否希望更好地使用轮胎, "得相见. 我的意思是法拉利队在前3名是令人印象深刻的。 他们昨天看起来并不惊人,今天他们确实向前迈出了一步. 我认为在比赛中,它们一般在每一个角落都是快活的,而不是在直道上那么快. 因此,如果这意味着他们有 更多的降压, 那么在这个热度, 这只是一件好事 他们。 很明显我们会尽力的 但我觉得这比赛会很艰难 每个人都很接近"
items.summary: Q: Might you hope to use your tyres better and make up some places? "We'll have to see. I mean the Ferraris being in the top 3 is impressive. They didn't look amazing yesterday, today they've definitely made a step forward. I think in the race, they're generally quick in all the corners and not so much on the straights. So if that means they have more downforce then in this heat, that's only a good thing for them. We'll try our best obviously but I think it'll be a tough race and everyone pretty close on pace"
items.summary_zh: 问:你是否希望更好地使用轮胎, "得相见. 我的意思是法拉利队在前3名是令人印象深刻的。 他们昨天看起来并不惊人,今天他们确实向前迈出了一步. 我认为在比赛中,它们一般在每一个角落都是快活的,而不是在直道上那么快. 因此,如果这意味着他们有 更多的降压, 那么在这个热度, 这只是一件好事 他们。 很明显我们会尽力的 但我觉得这比赛会很艰难 每个人都很接近"

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Ultimately were you caught out by what happened? "No, I was in front of it. Just not quick e…
items.title_zh: 问:你最终是否为所难? "不,我在它前面。 但对我们来说还不够快 我想整个周末我们之间 最多有一半的时间 我觉得我们可能 得到的东西最多。 最后一圈在几个地方有点乱 但我们今天没有足够的时间去挑战乔治 似乎我们昨天真的很有竞争力, 甚至早在Q1,Q2开始时,
items.summary: Q: Ultimately were you caught out by what happened? "No, I was in front of it. Just not quick enough for us unfortunately. I think the whole weekend there's been half a tenth, at most, between the two of us. I feel like we're probably getting the most out of things. The last lap was a little bit messy in a few places but we didn't have enough to go and challenge George today. Little bit frustrating, it seemed like we were really competitive yesterday and even at the start of Q1, Q2 just missing out on that last little bit."
items.summary_zh: 问:你最终是否为所难? "不,我在它前面。 但对我们来说还不够快 我想整个周末我们之间 最多有一半的时间 我觉得我们可能 得到的东西最多。 最后一圈在几个地方有点乱 但我们今天没有足够的时间去挑战乔治 似乎我们昨天真的很有竞争力, 甚至早在Q1,Q2开始时,

items.title_zh: "整个周末我们之间 最多只有十分之一,所以我们得到了最多的。 最后一圈有点乱 但我们还不足以挑战GR 我们昨天似乎竞争对手,
items.summary: "the whole weekend theres been half a tenth at most between us (mcl), so we're getting the most out of it. last lap was a little messy, but we didn't have enough to challenge GR. a bit frustrating. we seemed competitive yesterday and in Q1/Q2. just missing the last little bit." https://t.co/fFMLWmp8Gp
items.summary_zh: "整个周末我们之间 最多只有十分之一,所以我们得到了最多的。 最后一圈有点乱 但我们还不足以挑战GR 我们昨天似乎竞争对手,

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: how important will having good deg be tomorrow? oscar: it'll be important but you dont magic…
items.title_zh: 问:明天有好律师有多重要? 奥斯卡:这很重要,但你不会神奇地得到, 你得到它与空气, 照顾轮胎作为一个司机... 我们落后一步在德格, 它使事情艰难, 但我有很好的想法 如何有一个好的比赛明天
items.summary: Q: how important will having good deg be tomorrow? oscar: it'll be important but you dont magically get that, you get it with aero, looking after tyres as a driver... we're a step behind on deg, it makes things tough, but i've got good ideas on how to have a good race tomorrow https://t.co/14sfvGhKfV
items.summary_zh: 问:明天有好律师有多重要? 奥斯卡:这很重要,但你不会神奇地得到, 你得到它与空气, 照顾轮胎作为一个司机... 我们落后一步在德格, 它使事情艰难, 但我有很好的想法 如何有一个好的比赛明天

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "how confident are you on fighting mercedes and ferrari?" oscar: "it will be tough, to be ho…
items.title_zh: Oscar:"老实说,你会很艰难。 我们只是缺乏最后一点。 在比赛中我们一圈都缺少它 和它不是很容易 弥补。"
items.summary: Q: "how confident are you on fighting mercedes and ferrari?" oscar: "it will be tough, to be honest. we're just lacking that last little bit. we're lacking it over one lap, in the race as well. and it's not very easy to make that up." https://t.co/zXJFVRtjIx
items.summary_zh: Oscar:"老实说,你会很艰难。 我们只是缺乏最后一点。 在比赛中我们一圈都缺少它 和它不是很容易 弥补。"

items.summary: 📻 tom's message to oscar after quali: "9 milli-seconds between the two mclarens. i'm sure you're not happy with being p7 but i think that's a pretty fair representation of where we are."

items.title: X repost from @oscarsspiastree: oscar's thoughts on fp day: "it was a pretty good day. we are a step behind mercedes, but we ex…
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡在fp日的想法:"这是一个相当不错的一天. 我们比商场落后了一步 但我们预料到了 今天很有成果 我们尝试了很多 我们做了一些家庭作业 从斯潘,我觉得我们已经做了一个很好的工作。 已经很不错了!"
items.summary: oscar's thoughts on fp day: "it was a pretty good day. we are a step behind mercedes, but we expected it. it's been a productive day, we tried a lot of things. we had some homework to do on my side from spain and i feel like we've done a good job of that. it's been pretty good!" https://t.co/yJenAS6LcZ
items.summary_zh: 奥斯卡在fp日的想法:"这是一个相当不错的一天. 我们比商场落后了一步 但我们预料到了 今天很有成果 我们尝试了很多 我们做了一些家庭作业 从斯潘,我觉得我们已经做了一个很好的工作。 已经很不错了!"
